title: TurnOutput
description: What the LLM must emit each turn. The engine owns truth; the model only PROPOSES deltas. Validated and applied by the engine, never trusted blindly.

narration.description: Prose shown to the player. Must be concrete and grounded in blueprint texture; never generic mush (see commit-directive).

deltas.description: Proposed state changes. Empty array is valid (pure description / refused action).

op.description: set: set a state field; add/remove: inventory or set membership; move: relocate entity; flag: boolean world flag; fact: append an established fact to the ledger.

target.description: Dotted path or entity id the op applies to, e.g. 'player.location', 'inventory', 'npc.rachel.mood'.

value.description: New value / item / fact text. Type depends on op.

reason.description: Optional short justification, grounded in retrieved material or ledger. Used by the engine for validation/audit.
